title: SD2: Spatially resolved transcriptomics decon-volution through integration of dropout and spatial information
author: Li, Haoyang
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: A novel spatial transcriptomics (ST) deconvolution method called SD 2  integrating spatial information of ST data and embracing an important characteristic, dropout, which is traditionally considered as an obstruction in single-cell RNA sequencing data (scRNA-seq) analysis.
steps_raw: A novel spatial transcriptomics (ST) deconvolution method called SD 2  integrating spatial information of ST data and embracing an important characteristic, dropout, which is traditionally considered as an obstruction in single-cell RNA sequencing data (scRNA-seq) analysis.
